results.title: Bengaluru: Realtor alleges blackmail by live-in partner
results.description: Extortion case: A Bengaluru realtor accused his live-in partner and her husband of blackmail, alleging threats to leak private photographs and demands for money. Police registered a case and launched an investigation.

results.title: International forum to discuss climate resilience, sustainable development
results.description: Government Degree College (GDC), Salooni, in collaboration with Global Forum for Sustainable Rural Development (GFSRD) will organise an international virtual symposium on June 5 to mark World Environment Day from 4 pm to 6 pm. The symposium aims to raise awareness about environmental conservation, sustainable development, climate resilience and inclusive approaches to addressing ecological challenges, [...]
